pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.3 to 3.3.4 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Configure the project to compile and run on Java 21.
Rename the project artifact and name from 'example' to 'happycows' to reflect the specific application.
Update the project description to accurately describe the application as a simulation game.
pom.xml.human_impl: <description>A Simulation Game of the Tragedy of the Commons.</description>

pom.xml.general_idea: Add a configurable property for target classes used in testing plugins.
Remove the MongoDB starter dependency as it is no longer used or required.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 for compatibility with Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.
Add Microsoft Playwright for browser automation in tests.
Add WireMock for stubbing HTTP services in tests.
Add Awaitility for asynchronous testing support.
Add Spring Security Config to manage security context in async threads.
Add Apache Commons CSV for CSV processing utilities.
Configure Maven Compiler Plugin to enable full annotation processing.
Configure Surefire Plugin to use TCP for event transmission to fix test execution issues.
Add Git Commit ID Plugin to generate git properties during build.
Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to version 0.8.10 for better Java 21 support.
Update JaCoCo exclusions to match the new package structure (happiercows).
Add JaCoCo check execution to enforce strict code coverage rules.
Upgrade Pitest plugin to version 1.17.0 for mutation testing.
Upgrade Pitest JUnit5 plugin to version 1.2.1.
Update Pitest configuration to use history files and new package exclusions.
Add a 'wiremock' profile to enable H2 database and wiremock-specific settings.
Add an 'integration' profile to enable H2 database and frontend build steps.
Upgrade Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for modern frontend tooling.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add an alternative directory name for Storybook static output to .gitignore to prevent accidental commits.
Add macOS .DS_Store files to .gitignore to prevent cluttering the repository with local metadata.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get package management commands with apk equivalents required by the Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven via apk since the new base image does not include it, ensuring the build tool is available.
Install Node.js using nvm to replace the previous NodeSource setup script, updating the runtime version.
Install bash explicitly as it is not present by default in the minimal Alpine image.
Install libstdc++ to provide C++ standard library support required by native dependencies or tools.
Install git to support build processes or configuration that rely on git metadata.
Replace the generic bash entrypoint with a specific Maven build and Java execution command to run the application.
Set the PRODUCTION environment variable to true to ensure the application runs in production mode.
Copy the entire project directory including git info to support Dokku configuration requirements.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project from the generic demo example to the specific HappyCows application.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title from '# demo-spring-react-example-v2: dsre-v2' to '# HappyCows/HappierCows'

README.md.general_idea: Replace old Storybook and Heroku deployment links with new Dokku production and QA links.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced Storybook links with tables for 'Production Deployments' and 'F24 Deployments' pointing to dokku-00.cs.ucsb.edu

README.md.general_idea: Rewrite the description to reflect the new HappyCows game context and tech stack details.
README.md.human_impl: Added description about 'Tragedy of the Commons' simulation and Spring Boot/React stack with Google OAuth

README.md.general_idea: Remove documentation specific to Heroku deployment and database access.
README.md.human_impl: Deleted sections '# Getting Started on Heroku' and Heroku-specific database console instructions

README.md.general_idea: Update the frontend connection error message to reference Dokku instead of Heroku.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'On Heroku, be sure that PRODUCTION is defined' to 'On Dokku, be sure that PRODUCTION is defined'

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions for running integration, end-to-end, and mutation tests.
README.md.human_impl: Added sections '# To Run Integration and End-to-end Tests' and '# Partial pitest runs' with mvn commands

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for React Toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add import for MSW Storybook addon to enable API mocking in stories.
Initialize Mock Service Worker with dynamic URL handling for localhost and remote environments.
Add MSW decorator globally to all stories to enable mocking.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: mswDecorator, // provide the MSW decorator globally

frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.general_idea: Simplify the Jekyll site title from a QA-specific label to a generic documentation title.
Remove duplicate and placeholder configuration entries for repo_name to streamline the config file.

frontend/docs-index/_layouts/default.htm.general_idea: Change the HTML title tag to display the repository name instead of the page-specific title.
Remove the external stylesheet link from the document head.
Modify the main heading to explicitly state 'Documentation for' followed by the repository name.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Replace simple list-based documentation index with structured HTML tables for better readability and organization.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Replaced bullet points with `<table>` structures for Documentation, Test Coverage, and Open Pull Requests sections.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Add inline CSS styles to format the new table-based documentation index.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Added `<style>` block with border, padding, and zebra-stripe rules for tables.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Update repository links to point to GitHub Actions instead of a separate docs repo.
Add dynamic tables to display Javadoc, Storybook, and test coverage reports for open pull requests.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Added Jinja2 loops `{% for pr in site.pull_requests %}` to generate rows for PR-specific documentation and coverage links.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Add a notes section explaining potential issues with PR documentation links and pitest incremental results.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Added 'Notes' section with bullet points explaining backend/frontend link updates and pitest history behavior.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Explicitly pin the required Node.js version to 16.20.0 to ensure environment consistency.
Add @testing-library/dom as a direct dependency for testing utilities.
Add babel-loader to dependencies, likely for explicit build configuration control.
Add nock for HTTP request mocking in tests.
Add react-hook-form library for form state management.
Add react-toastify for notification toast components.
Upgrade Stryker mutation testing tools from v4 to v6 to support newer Node/Jest versions.
Add ESLint and React plugin as dev dependencies for code linting.
Add jest-watch-typeahead to improve developer experience when running tests in watch mode.
Add Mock Service Worker (MSW) for API mocking in tests and Storybook.
Remove inline eslintConfig from package.json, likely moving to a dedicated config file.
Raise code coverage requirements from 90% to 100% for all metrics.
